commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human PR handling is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label, stale proof for the current head, and a P2 correctness finding in a stacked Policy/security surface.; Needs attention: Needs attention because the new security-policy evidence can misstate rejected custom bind config as active Gateway exposure; no dependency or workflow supply-chain change was found.; Review finding: [P2] Skip blank custom... (sha=85e80639687bf7b24e990b82966dc363fa3dd740)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds config-only Gateway exposure posture evidence, Policy doctor/lint findings, docs, and focused tests to the bundled Policy plugin.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. The PR head marks blank custom bind evidence as non-loopback and has a test expecting that finding, while current main Gateway runtime rejects blank custom bind before listening.
commands.review_followup: Human PR handling is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label, stale proof for the current head, and a P2 correctness finding in a stacked Policy/security surface.
